title: AI时代的财富神话背后，谁分得最大？
description: 大家都说这是一个人工智能驱动大众财富创造的时代，从SK海力士到英伟达再到长鑫，利润都在飙升。
titleZh: AI时代的财富神话背后，谁分得最大？
titleEn: Behind the Wealth Myth of the AI Era, Who Took the Biggest Slice?
descriptionZh: 大家都说这是一个人工智能驱动大众财富创造的时代，从SK海力士到英伟达再到长鑫，利润都在飙升。
descriptionEn: Everyone says this is an era of AI-driven mass wealth creation, from SK Hynix to Nvidia to ChangXin, profits are soaring. But the truth that wealth is highly concentrated upstream is rarely mentioned. Midstream and downstream cloud vendors and large model companies are still struggling to turn a profit. How much longer can this wealth myth last?

descriptionEn: Facing Google’s complete shopping loop in the Agent era, how will Alibaba respond?

title: 编写 Transformer 的 20 岁年轻人真正开源了 2180 亿个参数的模型
description: 刚刚，Cohere发布了Command A+，这是一个MoE模型，拥有2180亿个参数，能够在单台B200上运行，支持48种语言，并具有原生引文能力。
titleZh: 编写 Transformer 的 20 岁年轻人真正开源了 2180 亿个参数的模型
titleEn: The 20-Year-Old Who Wrote the Transformer Truly Open-Sourced a 218-Billion-Parameter Model
descriptionZh: 刚刚，Cohere发布了Command A+，这是一个MoE模型，拥有2180亿个参数，能够在单台B200上运行，支持48种语言，并具有原生引文能力。
descriptionEn: Just now, Cohere released Command A+, an MoE model with 218 billion parameters, capable of running on a single B200, supporting 48 languages, and featuring native citation capabilities. But the most explosive part of this release isn’t in the spec sheet—it’s in the license: Apache 2.0.

title: 无需添加单个 GPU 即可挤出 15% 的计算能力：大型模型社区“外科手术瞄准”网络
description: 这种从“堆叠硬件”到“挖矿效率”的转变正在对上游供应链产生切实的影响。
titleZh: 无需添加单个 GPU 即可挤出 15% 的计算能力：大型模型社区“外科手术瞄准”网络
titleEn: Squeeze Out 15% More Computing Power Without Adding a Single GPU: The Large Model Community "Surgically Targets" Networks
descriptionZh: 这种从“堆叠硬件”到“挖矿效率”的转变正在对上游供应链产生切实的影响。
descriptionEn: This shift from "stacking hardware" to "mining efficiency" is having a tangible impact on the upstream supply chain. The number of switches and optical modules required by the ZCube architecture is one-third less than that of the original solution.

title: OpenClaw案例：无需恶意攻击，日常聊天也能“劫持”特工
description: 日常对话可能会无意中污染个性化代理的长期记忆，导致其偏离用户在未来任务中的真实意图。
titleZh: OpenClaw案例：无需恶意攻击，日常聊天也能“劫持”特工
titleEn: OpenClaw Case: No Malicious Attack Needed, Everyday Chat Can Also "Hijack" an Agent
descriptionZh: 日常对话可能会无意中污染个性化代理的长期记忆，导致其偏离用户在未来任务中的真实意图。
descriptionEn: Everyday conversations may inadvertently pollute a personalized agent’s long-term memory, causing it to deviate from the user’s true intent in future tasks. Researchers using the ULSPB benchmark found that even without malicious prompts, daily dialogue can alter an agent’s safety boundaries.

descriptionEn: Claude Code charges by token, and Microsoft was the first to break! Engineers became addicted to Claude Code, and by the end of June, the company was forced to cut off access for all employees.
